working_on.notes: Submission feature with 7-stage pipeline is fully completed and deployed to Vercel.

pending_tasks.task: Sprint 4 kickoff: onboard 1-2 recruiter noi bo and capture friction logs
Manual browser QA for import page, pipeline board, and client detail after latest large batch
Consider upgrading Postgres SSL connection strings to sslmode=verify-full

recent_changes.description: Completed performance hardening: GIN trigram indexes for 5 ILIKE columns, Suspense streaming dashboard, cached public homepage/filters, shared access-scope module, and ISR blog page
Implemented 7-stage submission pipeline, Submissions module, label renames, Import & Submit action, and phone duplicate check
Completed Sprint 3/5: team scope, CRM-FDIWork sync, import UX, and deployment hardening on Vercel + Neon

errors_encountered.error: Monolithic dashboard executed 17+ parallel DB queries causing extreme blocking
errors_encountered.solution: Refactored into 3 React Suspense sections with streaming skeletons, prioritizing Fast Stats first

errors_encountered.error: Duplicate row-level security logic scattered across 6 files
errors_encountered.solution: Extracted withCandidateAccess, withClientAccess, etc. into shared src/lib/access-scope.ts removing ~150 lines

decisions_made.decision: Use GIN trigram indexes in PostgreSQL for all ILIKE text search columns
decisions_made.reason: Massively speeds up standard text searching without needing a heavy full-text search engine config

decisions_made.decision: Apply unstable_cache and ISR to public data (FDIWork)
decisions_made.reason: Public pages are read-heavy and dynamic per-request rendering queries caused unnecessary DB load

decisions_made.decision: Extract access-scope.ts for row-based access control
decisions_made.reason: Prevents future regressions where one entity's access scope gets updated but another's is forgotten

verification.notes: Applied GIN trigram indexes on Neon DB
